title: Bacofoil Ultra Resistant Bin Liners with Drawstring Handles 50L - Leak-Proof and Tear Resistant Bin Bag with Ultra Protection Technology (3 Rolls, 30 Bags)…
features: Ultra Protection Technology: The Ultra Resistant bin bags feature advanced ultra protection technology, making them strong and reliable, preventing tearing and leaks, even when your bag is full to the brim
Tear Resistant and Durable: These bin bags have three layers of film that effectively prevent splitting, making them perfect for handling heavy loads
Leak-Proof Performance: These bin liners have sealed sides that effectively prevent leaks
Convenient Handling: The drawstring handles make these bin bags easy to lift, tie, and carry, making daily disposal tasks effortless for you and your family
Eco-Friendly: Made from 100% recycled plastic, these bin bags offer peace of mind while maintaining product quality
description: Product Description Ultra Resistant - Bin Bags Stay cool as a cucumber. Choose Ultra Resistant bin bags that prevent tearing and leaking. It’s easily done. You put a few more things in the bin and suddenly it’s overflowing. Will the bag tear? Will it leak? Will you even be able to get it out? Enter Ultra Resistant bin liners from Bacofoil. Their ultra protection technology with an embossed texture prevents tearing and leaking (even if the bag looks like it’s about to burst). Tear-resistant with three layers of film Leak-proof with sealed sides to prevent splitting Easy to lift, tie and carry with drawstring handles Available in 30L and 50L and made with 100% recycled plastic Why wait? Throw out those thin, unreliable bin bags and trust Bacofoil Ultra Resistant. Ultra Resistant Features Elasti-fit 30L Elasti-fit 50L Active Fresh 30L Active Fresh 50L Ultra Resistant 30L Ultra Resistant 50L Add To Basket Buying Options Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.6 out of 5 stars 1,065 — 4.4 out of 5 stars 87 4.4 out of 5 stars 87 4.4 out of 5 stars 157 4.4 out of 5 stars 157 Price £20.37 £ 20 . 37 — no data £20.38 £ 20 . 38 £20.38 £ 20 . 38 £18.73 £ 18 . 73 £19.83 £ 19 . 83 Strong & Tear Resistant ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ Leakproof ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ Drawstring ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ Elastic Fastening ✓ ✓ - no data - no data - no data - no data Ultra Resistant - no data - no data - no data - no data ✓ ✓ Scented - no data - no data ✓ ✓ - no data - no data Odour Resistant - no data - no data ✓ ✓ - no data - no data 100% recycled material ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ QTY per pack 12 10 12 10 12 10
